comment: SQL injection vulnerability. Use parameterized queries instead of f-strings to handle user-provided messages.
suggestion:
sql = "INSERT INTO logs (msg, ts) VALUES (?, ?)"
    CURSOR.execute(sql, (message, time.time()))
original: sql = f"INSERT INTO logs (msg, ts) VALUES ('{message}', {time.time()})"

comment: SQL injection vulnerability. Use parameterized queries for the LIMIT clause instead of string concatenation.
The execute call is missing parameters if the limit was applied, and the logic is split across lines.
